text.title: Agent Reasoning Depth Budget Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-reasoning-depth-budget is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Bill triples when extended-thinking flag is left on across all calls.
antipattern.reason: Single global budget; no Pareto pick.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1+r2 per task class.
Fix: Detect with r3 over-thinking signal; lower budget.

antipattern.description: Multi-turn agent slows down 3x by turn 10.
